mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sch_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY schedule_date ASC
SELECT * FROM sch_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND schedule_date = #{date} AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM sch_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND category = #{category} AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM sch_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sch_schedule (user_id, title, schedule_date, schedule_time, remind_before, note, category, repeat_type, repeat_week_days, repeat_month_date, repeat_end_date, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{scheduleDate}, #{scheduleTime}, #{remindBefore}, #{note}, #{category}, #{repeatRule.repeatType}, #{repeatRule.repeatWeekDays}, #{repeatRule.repeatMonthDate}, #{repeatRule.repeatEndDate}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE sch_schedule SET user_id = #{userId}, title = #{title}, schedule_date = #{scheduleDate}, schedule_time = #{scheduleTime}, remind_before = #{remindBefore}, note = #{note}, category = #{category}, repeat_type = #{repeatRule.repeatType}, repeat_week_days = #{repeatRule.repeatWeekDays}, repeat_month_date = #{repeatRule.repeatMonthDate}, repeat_end_date = #{repeatRule.repeatEndDate}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
